title: Google Calendar node returns 'Unauthorized' error
symptom: When attempting to sign in with Google in the Google Calendar node, an 'Unauthorized' error is returned after logging in and granting access.
not_this_if: Using a static domain instead of ngrok
root_cause: The 'Unauthorized' error typically occurs due to a mismatch between the OAuth Redirect URL configured in the Google Cloud Console and the URL being used by ngrok. Google requires that the redirect URI exactly matches what is set in the console.
fix_steps: Start ngrok and note down your HTTPS ngrok URL.
Go to Google Cloud Console and select your project.
Add your ngrok URL to the Authorized redirect URIs.
agent_instruction: Ensure your ngrok URL is correctly added to the Google Cloud Console as an authorized redirect URI.
